caption: A presentation slide for a "CRYOGENIC ENGINEERING" course, specifically "Tutorial – 3", is shown. The slide focuses on the "Work/unit mass of gas compressed" and features a temperature-entropy (T-S) diagram with several paths labeled "T=const", "D=const", and "p=const". The diagram includes numerical markers 1 through 5 and arrows indicating the direction of processes. A blue mathematical formula, "W/m = T1(s1 - s2) - (h1 - h2)", appears on the slide. The NPTEL logo is visible in the bottom left corner, and the footer identifies the presenter as "Prof. M D Atrey, Department of Mechanical Engineering, IIT Bombay". Across the sequence of frames, the only change is the appearance of the blue formula, which is absent in the first frame and then appears and remains constant in the subsequent frames.
